Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • approver_group_id_list - (Required) (Updatable) The IAM group OCIDs allowed to approve requests for this privileged API control.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Optional description for this privileged API control.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) The unique display name for this privileged API control.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • notification_topic_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCI Notifications topic OCID for privileged API control events.
  • number_of_approvers - (Optional) (Updatable) The number of approvers required for each request.
  • privileged_operation_list - (Required) (Updatable) The privileged operations controlled by this resource.
  • resource_type - (Required) (Updatable) The service resource type governed by this privileged API control.
  • resources - (Required) (Updatable) The governed resource identifiers for this privileged API control.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
